name: ADAS CAPL Functions
title: ADAS CAPL Functions
description: Retrieves the name of the Detected Object that triggered the wait function.
Waits for a Detected Object for with a speed above/below a specified value.
tables: Retrieves the name of the Detected Object that triggered the wait function.
